briefdescription.para: Convenience getters.

detaileddescription.para: Igor Pro does not allow cross IM access to constants

briefdescription.para: Determine the namespace of the given neurodata type.
Return the initial values for the missing_fields attribute depending on the channel type, one of IPNWBChannelTypes, and the clamp mode, one in IPNWB_ClampModes.
Derive the channel type, one of IPNWBChannelTypes, from the neurodata_type attribute and return it.

parameterdescription.para: string with neurodata type specification defined in nwb.icephys.json_

briefdescription.para: Derive the clamp mode from the neurodata_type attribute and return it.

parameterdescription.para: string with neurodata type specification defined in nwb.icephys.json_

briefdescription.para: Determine the neurodata type based on channel type and clamp mode.

parameterdescription.para: one in
one in

simplesect.para: neurodata_type string with neurodata type specification defined in nwb.icephys.json_

briefdescription.para: get the (major) version of the nwb file

parameterdescription.para: id of open hdf5 file

briefdescription.para: convert version string to major version
convert version string to major and all minor numeric versions

parameterdescription.para: numeric first part of the version string (major Version)
numeric second part of the version string (minor Version)
numeric third part of the version string (sub Version)

briefdescription.para: Load the NWB specification from files in the main directory.

detaileddescription.para: Note: Open, FbinRead and Close are not threadsafe

parameterdescription.para: Igor Pro file path to specifications (Path Separator: ":")
specifications file identifier (without trailing *.json ending)

briefdescription.para: Return Folder of NWB:N specifications.

detaileddescription.para: Note: This is typically located at the location of the IPNWB program ipf files. FunctionPath is not threadsafe

briefdescription.para: Read a text attribute as semicolon ; separated list.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group or dataset
Name of the attribute to load

briefdescription.para: Read a text attribute as text wave, return a single element wave with PLACEHOLDER if it does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group or dataset
Name of the attribute to load

briefdescription.para: Read a text attribute as string, return PLACEHOLDER if it does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group or dataset
Name of the attribute to load

briefdescription.para: Read a text attribute as number, return NaN if it does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Additional path on top of locationID which identifies the group or dataset
Name of the attribute to load

briefdescription.para: Read a text dataset as text wave, return a single element wave with PLACEHOLDER if it does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Name of the HDF5 dataset

briefdescription.para: Read a text dataset as string, return PLACEHOLDER if it does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Name of the HDF5 dataset

briefdescription.para: Read a text dataset as number, return NaN if it does not exist.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Name of the HDF5 dataset

memberdef.argsstring: (variable locationID, string name, string str, variable compressionMode=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: WriteTextDatasetIfSet

briefdescription.para: Write a text dataset only if it is not equal to PLACEHOLDER.

parameterdescription.para: HDF5 identifier, can be a file or group
Name of the HDF5 dataset
Contents to write into the dataset
[optional, defaults to NO_COMPRESSION] Type of compression to use, one of CompressionMode

briefdescription.para: get location of the patchclamp series acquisition object

parameterdescription.para: target NWB version

briefdescription.para: get NWB version for current Igor Pro implementation

parameterdescription.para: maior NWB version e.g. 2

simplesect.para: full version string in the format (?:NWB-)?[1,2]\.[0-9](?:\.[0-9])?[b]?

briefdescription.para: get latest supported NWB version
Return the name of the history dataset.
NWB utility functions.
